# PCI DSS Evidence Package (DRAFT) — ACME Payments (de-identified)

> Draft evidence support only; this package does not attest PCI DSS compliance, does not mark any requirement In Place, and is not an AOC, ROC, or SAQ. Every compliance determination and attestation is reserved to a QSA, authorized ISA, or the organization's authorized signer.

## 1. Assessment Scope and Metadata
- Entity: ACME Payments (de-identified)
- PCI DSS version: 4.0.1
- Assessment type: SAQ D (Service Provider) - draft evidence support
- Assessment period: 2025-07-18 to 2026-07-17
- As-of date: 2026-07-17
- Config version: pci-evidence-2026.07

## 2. Cardholder Data Environment (CDE) Summary
- CDE summary: Tokenized card acceptance; segmented CDE; no SAD stored post-authorization.
- Scope of this package: evidence readiness support for a QSA/ISA-led assessment; not a scope validation.

## 3. Requirement-to-Control-to-Evidence Mapping
| Requirement | Controls | Evidence readiness | Evidence refs | Reason |
| ----------- | -------- | ------------------ | ------------- | ------ |
| 1.2.7 Network security controls reviewed at least every six months | CTL-NET-REVIEW | evidence-complete | EV-001 | Each mapped control has current, in-scope evidence |
| 11.3.2 External vulnerability scans performed by an ASV quarterly | CTL-ASV-SCAN | evidence-complete | EV-003 | Each mapped control has current, in-scope evidence |
| 11.4.1 Penetration testing methodology defined and executed | CTL-PENTEST | evidence-complete | EV-004 | Each mapped control has current, in-scope evidence |
| 10.4.1 Audit logs reviewed to identify anomalies or suspicious activity | CTL-LOGGING | evidence-complete | EV-007 | Each mapped control has current, in-scope evidence |
| 3.6.1 Procedures to protect cryptographic keys are defined and implemented | CTL-KEY-MGMT | evidence-gap | - | No in-scope evidence for control(s): CTL-KEY-MGMT |
| 7.2.4 User accounts and access privileges reviewed periodically | CTL-ACCESS-REVIEW | evidence-stale | EV-006 | Evidence past freshness window for control(s): CTL-ACCESS-REVIEW |
| 12.3.1 Targeted risk analysis performed for applicable requirements | CTL-RISK-ASSESS | evidence-stale | EV-009 | Evidence past freshness window for control(s): CTL-RISK-ASSESS |
| 9.4.1 Media with cardholder data physically secured | - | needs-data | - | Requirement is not mapped to any control |
| 3.2.1 Sensitive authentication data not stored after authorization | CTL-SAD-NA | not-applicable | EV-010 | Marked N/A with documented justification: Service does not retain SAD post-authorization; validated by data-flow evidence EV-010 |

## 4. Evidence Readiness Summary
- Total requirements assessed: 9
- evidence-complete: 4
- evidence-gap: 1
- evidence-stale: 2
- needs-data: 1
- not-applicable: 1
- NOTE: counts describe evidence readiness only and are NOT a compliance determination.

## 5. Gap and Remediation Register
| Requirement | Control | Issue | Remediation owner | Target date | Severity |
| ----------- | ------- | ----- | ----------------- | ----------- | -------- |
| 3.6.1 | CTL-KEY-MGMT | no in-scope evidence for control | Crypto/Key Management Team | 2026-08-31 | high |
| 7.2.4 | CTL-ACCESS-REVIEW | evidence stale; refresh required | IAM Team | 2026-08-15 | medium |
| 12.3.1 | CTL-RISK-ASSESS | evidence stale; refresh required | Security Risk Team | 2026-08-10 | medium |
| 9.4.1 | - | no control mapped to requirement | Facilities/Physical Security | 2026-09-15 | low |

## 6. Assumptions and Open Items
- Assumptions and any items pending input from the PCI program manager are listed here.
- N/A determinations require documented justification per PCI DSS; unjustified N/A is set to needs-data.

## 7. Source and Citation Index
- 1.2.7: grc:review=NSC-2026-H1@2026-05-01
- 11.3.2: vulnscan:asv=Q2-2026-PASS@2026-06-20
- 11.4.1: grc:pentest=2025-ANNUAL@2025-09-01
- 10.4.1: siem:logreview=2026-07-16@2026-07-16
- 7.2.4: iam:review=ACC-2025-H2@2025-11-01
- 12.3.1: grc:tra=2025-01@2025-01-10
- 3.2.1: grc:na=SAD-3.2.1@2026-06-01

## 8. Approvals and Attestation Boundary
- Prepared by: PCI Program Manager (analyst-id ANL-42)
- Compliance reviewer: (pending review)
- QSA / authorized ISA sign-off: pending (attestation is NOT performed by this skill).
- Attestation made by this package: NO.
- Draft evidence support only; this package does not attest PCI DSS compliance, does not mark any requirement In Place, and is not an AOC, ROC, or SAQ. Every compliance determination and attestation is reserved to a QSA, authorized ISA, or the organization's authorized signer.
